subject: chemistry
title: 17N.3.HL.TZ0.27
question_html: Ethanol slows down the reaction time of a driver leading to traffic accidents. Explain how the concentration of ethanol in a sample of breath can be determined using a fuel cell breathalyser.
solution_html:
ethanol is oxidized «to ethanoic acid»

OR

electrons are released

current/potential proportional to concentration «of ethanol»

OR

current compared to a reference «to determine concentration»

Accept “ethanol reacts with oxygen” for M1.

Accept “voltage” for “potential”.
